description: Very positive, and substantial savings over similar products that are designed and marketed specifically to the education market.
author: John R. T.
pros: We have a mix or contracted and hourly employees. Replicon was able to be customized to our environment, making tracking and reporting of attendance and payroll effortless.
cons: Nothing immediately comes to mind. It sometimes becomes confusing (at least to me) to correctly set up an employee with the multitude of features available, I almost always lean on tech support for guidance/assistance, which is usually instant.

review_title: Replicon is a great first step
description: Overall, it worked well. The reports were easy to use. The clocking in and out function for our team was easy to use.
author: Jadee H.
pros: I liked how easy Replicon seemed to be for our users.
cons: Price. Some of the product functionality. We desired it to do more than it seemed able to do at the time.

description: Replicon is reliable and something we have grown accustomed. Unfortunately, replicon management/developers do not appear to appreciate the profound negative impact their program changes inflict on their clients' workflows.
author: Stephen G.
pros: We have use replicon for nearly 20 years, starting when the product a stand alone software program residing on our computer and later migrating to the online product that it is today. It has been a reliable storage place for a time and expenses with reports that were easily manipulated to provide the data that we needed for our management purposes.
cons: What we liked least, is a result of our migration to Gen-3. Who could've imagined that replicon, which change the functionality of their own reports? This has added hours upon hours of extra work on our part every month. Furthermore, I truly have lost count on the hundreds of hours spent gathering data and sending it to replicon so they might fix their own oversight.

description: Very professional and accommodating, our issues and concerns were properly document and addressed. I found the team "listened to hear, not listened to reply". This was a refreshing change from the typical sales cycle
author: Randy Y.
pros: Replicon provided a complete package to better manage our backend activities that directly affect our forward facing deliverables to the customer
cons: Little to early to tell yet, we need time to shake out the implementation
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our overall experience has been good. The BI functionality is strong, but requires a lot of figuring it out for yourself. We needed this to overcome some of the non-customizable features that our team didn't understand. For the price, this is what I would choose again.
author: Joe H.
pros: The time savings has been significant as we moved from excel-based functionality. Overall the resource and project management features are to our liking.
cons: The ability to customize project dashboards would help my users.

description: My experience with Replicon has been great. They worked through transitioning us to their Gen 3 platform and it went great. Their support was able to fix any problems we encountered with implementation. They are extremely patient with getting us set up with a complicated integration project with another service.
author: Curran H.
pros: The support team is excellent and always willing to work through any problem and find a solution to your needs.
cons: Setting up users can be a little complicated.

author: Krista G.
pros: I like the reporting features, especially creating your own reports. It's much easier than the HRIS system I use in conjunction.
cons: I wish the bill rates didn't transfer over from project to project. It's hard to track.

review_title: Great Time Recording for any size business
description: great business to work with
author: Lisa Y.
pros: A great time recording tool for any size business, scaled up as the business grows. Support team are always quick to respond and helpful. I'm currently using the tool for time sheets for a salon team so it is affordable and effective and makes payroll & time off requests so much easier to administer and track.
cons: Take a while to get used to the software especially on tasks that you do not do weekly ie onboarding new employees and setting up so I sometimes have a few tweaks needed by the support team which is never an issue and always quick to resolve.

description: Great customer service, very professional, and very knowledgeable staff.
author: Malvin V.
pros: Like my review title states, Replicon is a very robust and flexible system that can cater to a company's need whether you have office/field staff, full time/part time staff, and anything in between. Being able to customize the system for different use cases and for different types of employees is great. The ability to create custom reports is powerful for data nerds like me.
cons: It does have some limitations in some very unique case uses, a bit pricey, and requires a yearly saas model. But overall I have no complaints.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Replicon, an easy way to monitor employee time
description: It has helped us with monitoring the hours of remote employees. It is a simple way to monitor that each member of the organization is working the hours stipulated. It is very easy to use and when the employee needs to take a break, he/she only has to stop the timer and at the end of the break, start it again. It is the solution to improve the performance of remote employees and closely monitor their daily activities. It is an easier and more effective way to make payments when the day is paid per hour worked. I highly recommend it because I have been using it for several months and so far it has not failed me.
author: Helene V.
pros: Very easy to install and follow, very intuitive and all our employees know how to use it without any problems. It takes screenshots from time to time to better monitor the activities of our remote employees. Can be paused at any time during the workday and continue without any problem.
cons: Some employees reported that their computers felt a little heavier after the installation of the program and sometimes it shut down suddenly and without explanation. Technical support was called and the issue was resolved. There have been some inconveniences when adding the weekly hours, but everything has been solved.

description: My overall experience with Replicon has been positive, as it effectively streamlines time tracking and project management, enhancing productivity despite occasional bugs.
author: Galateya M.
pros: Replicon is highly efficient in tracking time and managing projects, offering robust features that streamline workflows and improve productivity.
cons: Replicon can be frustrating due to occasional bugs and lagging issues that disrupt the user experience from time to time.

description: Excellent tool, easy access, friendly, easy document upload
author: Angelica A.
pros: Easy access and use. Easy to upload receipts. The platform is very friendly and fast to use. I can complete my expenses in no time!
cons: I've used this tool for the past 6 years and still have nothing negative to say about it.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software is great, I have no issues with it, I like the collaboration tools and the integration with other important software, the prevention of redundancy and the UI. It has all the tools needed for such software. Has a wide variety 3rd party software. Easy to use , no need for training.
cons: reorientating between billable and unbillable integration is important and needs to be more in-depth with some reporting.

description: Implementation was brutal. Once we were up and running, we've encountered some issues, but mostly due to our own user error. The great part, and saving grace, has been technical support. Anytime we do have an issue, someone is there to jump on a Zoom or call with us and fix it quickly. Ganesh and others have been our lifesavers.
author: Linda D.
pros: Their enhanced technical support is definitely worth the money. Being on the west coast in the US, we need assistance at different times. We can call/email/etc. tech support 24/7 and get almost immediate assistance. We use Replicon in limited ways for two reasons. First, you can enter your time online or from the app, making it very easy. Second, we need to track our time against clients' projects for billing purposes, and the Replicon system makes that easy.
cons: The implementation process was brutal. Because we're an HR consulting firm, we don't need all of the bells & whistles offered by Replicon. We initially planned on using the invoicing module, but the interface with QuickBooks didn't allow for the specificity needed for reporting, so we now export reports and issue invoices through QB. There's a work around for everything!

review_title: I'm still baffled about why this software was rated so highly on 3rd party sites
description: If I would go back in time, I would not purchase this product. This was the first time seeking out a time management software, I have learned a lot since. I am actively seeking a replacement, but we now have so many integrations tied to Replicon that unfortunately it is difficult to switch.
author: Rona Y.
pros: We got a discount of $12/user - I think that is fairly cheap. I also like that you can quickly type in hours without having to "create an entry". Having the new functionality of restricting by task and location is helpful.
cons: There are too many restrictions that do not make sense. The UI is terrible. You cannot see comments quickly for each entry. Creating new tasks should not be so difficult.
author_profession: Head of Customer Success Operations and Education

description: It gave the company a central place to manage time and working hours for 250+ employees, across facilities that operated under normal business hours and some that were 24/7.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Replicon makes keeping track of your time in the office very easy. Entering your in and out times is very easy. The ability to input expenses and mileage makes things easy for our accounting department.
cons: The few things that gave me trouble were the input of time when not using a 24 hour time format. If you put in 3:00, before you could type pm, it would add am to it and go to the next entry module. Adding mileage was a bit overinvolved than it should be. You created the entry, then had to do another entry within that entry to actually input your mileage.

description: Overall ( help me with invoicing and time tracking so good)
author: Jenish S.
pros: Timesheets and uploading bills on the expenses.
cons: - user interface- Complex to use and teach to other users- lagging ( once I assign a task to a user its takes longer time to set )

author: Vivian Y.
pros: project management, task assignment are good.
cons: we need more complex reports, it will take more efforts to merge or combine different reports together

description: We have had an excellent experience with Replicon and the utilization of this software has dramatically improved our Project Management capabilities and streamlined project financial tracking.
author: Michelle H.
pros: Once we used the software enough, it provided the means to accurately manage our project financials.
cons: It would be beneficial for Replicon to offer one-on-one training on customizable forms. There are alot of forms provided and many more available. Helping clients understand how these forms can be modified to suite their needs would be beneficial. Our experience has been that then online help offered is generic and it is difficult to learn on your own.

review_title: Replicon TimeBill's flexibility makes it THE market leader.
description: the Replicon TimeBill application has allowed us to streamline reimbursable agreements from and accuracy and timeliness perspective. Project/Program management has also improved using the data collected/reported in Replicon. Some of our projects/programs require a cost management reporting component and this has been fairly simple to design, develop and deploy. Early adoption of TBM models has also been possible with this product.
author: John G.
pros: As a federal government organization, we had some rather unusual requirements and we have been able to customize the application to achieve 98% of our needs within the system. The ability to use Excel.CSV imports and exports has saved us a tremendous amount of time without compromising data integrity.
cons: The reporting function is very powerful but a little arcane in construction and distribution. We have been able to work around these issues, but would like to see some gains in this area.

author: Carolyn D.
pros: User an Proejct setup . Reporting and data extraction to excl.
cons: Sometimes appears a bit "clunky" . I would like more intuitive report creation.

description: Excellent. The Replicon support staff is very helpful in helping with my requests and any customized reports.
author: Daniel Z.
pros: Sparx USA has been using Replicon for over 2 overs. Sparx was looking for software to automate time and attendance for the staff. The software implementation went smoothly and used on a daily basis by the staff. The software allows the staff to have full visibility of their time and attendance either thru a mobile app or log-in into the website.
cons: Setting up the annual employee vacation time. It is confusing for a end user based on the validation rules to accrue time correctly. Replicon support was excellent in helping me set-up the staff vacation time.

author: Ada Z.
pros: Service and patience of your support team.
cons: The frequency that you change the support team members.

review_title: Overall, Replicon has been great for our organization.
description: Overall, my experience with Replicon is good and I would like to learn more about the systems additional features that we aren't utilizing.
author: Khara N.
pros: What we like most about Replicon is the ability to create a detailed way for staff to capture the projects they are working on.
cons: What I like least about Replicon is sometimes as the administrator, it can be a little challenging figuring out how to do some of the most basic things in the system.

description: Replicon and their support have always been responsive and easy to work with.
author: Mishelle B.
pros: The ease of recording time and expenses and managing users
cons: It is sometimes difficult to get wanted reporting.
